hooks.prompt:
Throughout this session, capture decisions, concepts, and preferences into docs/decisions/LOG.md. User prompts are gold — every prompt may contain design decisions, voice preferences, branding choices, corrections, or conceptual insights. Extract and log them without being asked.

Entry format: - **YYYY-MM-DD** [type] — [summary]
Types: decision, concept, preference

Rules: summarize in one sentence, group related items, read the log first to avoid duplicates, append only, never edit existing entries. If the file doesn't exist, create it with a # Decision Log heading.
